Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory & Appraisal And Petition To Close The Administration Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Continued To Nov-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this matter is on for status of filing a petition for final distribution, that said petition has not been filed, that it does have the final inventory and appraisal. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney R. Michael Delagnes to appear on November 24, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed and why there was no appearance today. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement.
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrea DiTullio for and with (Executor) Pamela Fobert. James Struck (via court call) for Guardian ad Litem Sandra Hart.

The Court stated that it has a revised order responsive to comments from the examiner, confirmed that there have been no objections and that there are no anticipated objections and signed the order in open court granting the petition for approval of the settlement agreement.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-06-2015 Continued To Jun-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Struck (via court call) for the claimants. Andrea DiTullio for and with (executor) Pamela Fobert.

The Court asked Mr. Struck if the petition for settlement would be filed soon and stated that the court could not grant the stipulation and order. Ms. DiTullio responded that pursuant to the settlement agreement the petition for family allowance is to be withdrawn. Mr. Struck confirmed that they intend to withdraw. Ms. DiTullio stated that she will file the petition for settlement within 30 days and that the estate should wrap up shortly. Mr. Struck stated that the creditors claims were rejected and were part of the civil action which was dismissed with prejudice Stanislaus County. The petition for family allowance is off calendar. The accounting status report was continued to June 8, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the petition for settlement.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lopes. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Continued To Jul-28-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Family Allowance.
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Katherine Jeffrey for and with Pamela Fobert (Executor). James Struck appeared by Court Call for Sandra Hart (Petitioner).

The Court informed Mr. Struck that courtesy copies are not to be faxed to the court directly. Mr. Struck explained that he wanted to respond to the Examiner timely. The Court stated that depending on the Stanislaus County Court's ruling on the TD Ameritrade Account, it may not be much funds left. Mr. Struck reported that the hearing is set on January 30, 2014 in Stanislaus County and that he agreed to put over his petition. Ms. Jeffrey stated that the ownership of the TD Ameritrade Account will be determined in Family Court in Stanislaus County. The Petition for Family Allowance was continued to March 24, 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Struck may appear by Court Call.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
